Perplexity just open-sourced their internal security scanner. It's called Bumblebee.

It scans your machine for compromised packages, malicious browser extensions, infected editor extensions (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf), and MCP server configs.

Read-only. Doesn't execute https://t.co/o3Np6LPhDF

Jony Ive 离开苹果之后第一个公开亮相的设计：

法拉利的首款电动车界面系统

曾经把多点触控带给世界的的人却反对现在的电动汽车完全的触控化：

 "为什么动力源是电的，大家就默认交互界面也得是数字化的？这是个巨大的跳跃，而且很武断。" https://t.co/MPLkooj7Ev
字节在涨价，小米 mimo 和 deepseek v4 在降价 ...

从公开可以推算的数据看出 ， 宇树科技 的 销售费用率 是多少。

这是从其IPO招股书（申报稿/上会稿）及公开报道中可直接推算或引用的数据。销售费用（含销售人员薪酬）约7600万元，对应同期营收约11.67亿元（全年营收约17.08亿元）。

Ask Grok what's the most ridiculous post you posted on X since you joined 😅

What did you get? 

Sharing mine is the comments https://t.co/azH5jRdM02

So it was my ugly doodle from Soviet children book post. Very recent creation, that went viral. And another one is again something unhinged from MJ times. 

I'll keep those coming 😅 https://t.co/8pAmKMSoG8

It costs nothing to be kind and support someone on social media and the outcome is usually an improved mood and feeling great being able to do something good. I often remind myself, that doing something for someone brings way better feeling than receiving a gift or attention.
